# Paperclip Copilot Instructions

Full instructions live in `.github/instructions/copilot-instructions.md`.

See also the scoped instruction files in `.github/instructions/` which apply automatically by context:
- `service-management.instructions.md` — server/packages change protocol
- `testing.instructions.md` — test and regression requirements
- `task-tracking.instructions.md` — todo file conventions
- `doc-rules.instructions.md` — doc authoring rules
